error.msg: The scope of the variable 'ref' can be reduced.
error.verbose: The scope of the variable 'ref' can be reduced. Warning: Be careful when fixing this message, especially when there are inner loops. Here is an example where cppcheck will write that the scope for 'i' can be reduced:\012void f(int x)\012{\012 int i = 0;\012 if (x) {\012 // it's safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 for (int n = 0; n < 10; ++n) {\012 // it is possible but not safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 do_something(&i);\012 }\012 }\012}\012When you see this message it is always safe to reduce the variable scope 1 level.

error.msg: 'buffer' is of type 'void *'. When using void pointers in calculations, the behaviour is undefined.

error.verbose: The scope of the variable 'A1' can be reduced. Warning: Be careful when fixing this message, especially when there are inner loops. Here is an example where cppcheck will write that the scope for 'i' can be reduced:\012void f(int x)\012{\012 int i = 0;\012 if (x) {\012 // it's safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 for (int n = 0; n < 10; ++n) {\012 // it is possible but not safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 do_something(&i);\012 }\012 }\012}\012When you see this message it is always safe to reduce the variable scope 1 level.

error.msg: The scope of the variable 'A2' can be reduced.
error.verbose: The scope of the variable 'A2' can be reduced. Warning: Be careful when fixing this message, especially when there are inner loops. Here is an example where cppcheck will write that the scope for 'i' can be reduced:\012void f(int x)\012{\012 int i = 0;\012 if (x) {\012 // it's safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 for (int n = 0; n < 10; ++n) {\012 // it is possible but not safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012 do_something(&i);\012 }\012 }\012}\012When you see this message it is always safe to reduce the variable scope 1 level.

error.msg: There is an unknown macro here somewhere. Configuration is required. If RAM_ADDR_FMT is a macro then please configure it.
error.verbose: There is an unknown macro here somewhere. Configuration is required. If RAM_ADDR_FMT is a macro then please configure it.

error.msg: The function 'bdrv_aio_readv' should have static linkage since it is not used outside of its translation unit.
error.verbose: The function 'bdrv_aio_readv' should have static linkage since it is not used outside of its translation unit.

error.verbose: Active checkers: There was critical errors (use --checkers-report=<filename> to see details)
